mdq:check.name: Resource Abstract Present
mdq:check.description: Check that a dataset abstract/description is present and meaningful.
mdq:check.code:
def call(): global output global status global abstract
import metadig.variable as mvar
# Check if abstract exists if 'abstract' not in globals() or abstract is None: output = "A dataset abstract/description was not found." status = "FAILURE" return False
# Convert to string if needed abstract = mvar.toUnicode(abstract)
# Check if blank if mvar.isBlank(abstract): output = "The dataset abstract is blank." status = "FAILURE" return False
# Check minimum length (at least 20 characters for meaningful description) abstract_str = abstract.strip() if isinstance(abstract, str) else str(abstract) if len(abstract_str) < 20: output = f"The dataset abstract is too short ({len(abstract_str)} characters). Minimum 20 characters recommended for meaningful description." status = "FAILURE" return False
# Success word_count = len(abstract_str.split()) if len(abstract_str) > 100: display_abstract = abstract_str[:100] + "..." else: display_abstract = abstract_str
output = f"Dataset abstract found: '{display_abstract}' ({len(abstract_str)} characters, {word_count} words)" status = "SUCCESS" return True

dialect.name: ISO 19115 and ISO 19115-2 / ISO 19139 and ISO 19139-2
